ModMetaData.name: Yet Another Research Tree (YART)
ModMetaData.author: SeoHyeon
ModMetaData.description:
Yet Another Research Tree (YART) replaces the vanilla research tab with a custom, graph-based tech tree.
Features - Automatic graph layout of all research, including projects and tabs added by other mods. - Per-channel research queue (vanilla bench, Anomaly knowledge, Vanilla Gravship Expanded, and more). - Fast search by research name, unlocked content, description, or @mod.
Compatibility - World Tech Level: OK. hides research above the world's tech level. - Vanilla Gravship Expanded: OK. shows Gravtech research as its own channel. - Semi Random Research: OK. its "Go to Tech Tree" button opens YART. - other Research Tree mods: NO.
